header.tagline: I love music and the sky.

about.heading: About
about.summary: I’m interested in music, aviation, and tech, and I’m definitely an introvert.

tech.intro: I’m a hobby developer passionate about building apps and contributing to open-source projects.

experience.heading: Development Experience
discordBot: A giveaway bot built with Node.js, currently active in approximately 5,000 servers.
ios: A memo application developed using Swift and SwiftUI.
web: Personal portfolio website, lyrics search website, metronome, etc.

languages.heading: Programming Languages
learning: Java, C, C++, Python, JavaScript (Node.js), TypeScript, and Swift.

hardware.heading: Hardware & Tinkering (Hands-on Experience)
hackintosh: Experience in building and maintaining macOS on non-Apple hardware.
raspberryPi: Deployed and managed as a server.
maker: Arduino, ESP32, 3D printing, laser engraving, and more.

tech.projectsTemplate: If you want to see what I’ve built, browse my {github} or take a look at {yorkDevelopment}.

music.daw: In my free time, I sometimes open up my DAW. These days I mainly use Logic Pro, but FL Studio was the first one I used. Whether I’m writing something new, learning a technique, or just experimenting, I just want to keep improving.
music.guitar: I recently picked up an electric guitar and have just started learning it.
music.note: Note: There are still many other great artists not listed here.

aviation.intro: I'm especially interested in civil aviation and the piloting side of it. I enjoy learning how airliners are operated, how crews manage complex flights, and the decisions behind safe, smooth operations.
aviation.airbus: I'm also an Airbus fanboy—from the fly-by-wire philosophy to the cockpit design, I love everything about it.
aviation.simPrefix: Flight simulator used: X-Plane 11 w/ ToLiss Airbus, you can check out my
aviation.simSuffix: for more details on my virtual flying activity.

photo.intro: Photography is a newer hobby for me. I'm a beginner and currently shoot with a Canon EOS R50.
photo.craft: I enjoy learning the basics, practicing composition, and capturing small moments as I explore more of the craft.

links.label: Links
links.heading: Links
links.coffeeSubtext: Help me do more amazing things!
links.discordWarning1: Before sending me a Discord DM, please start by saying what you want to ask.
links.discordWarning2: Please do not send just a friend request. I only accept requests from people I know.
links.discordWarning3: If I do not know your purpose for DMing or who you are, your friend request and DM may be ignored.

org.heading: Organizations
org.description: We build intuitive, user-friendly applications that make your daily tasks more convenient.

footer.builtWith: Built with ❤️ and Astro in Taiwan.

overlays.openArtworkTitle: Open artwork in a new tab
overlays.openArtworkLabel: Open original artwork in a new tab
overlays.albumPlayTemplate: I've listened to this album for {count} times.

runtime.tryRefreshing: Please try refreshing and if the issue persists, report it to me.
runtime.viewMyPlaysForTrack: View my plays for {title} by {artist} on Last.fm
runtime.sinceTooltip: My Last.fm account was created {ago} ago, and the playcount is based on all plays since then. Please note that the actual playcount may be higher than it shows here.
